title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
